description: A stylish, high-fashion choice from Inc. 5, with it's sleek design and floral print fabric, this pair will look great with day or party wear & ndash wear it to add a classy touch to your outfit.Heel: 2.5"UpperFloral textile footbed with a synthetic leather panel throughout and synthetic leather footbed at toe, ergonomically curved and lightly padded for absolute comfort and styleMidfoot straps in synthetic leather and floral printed fabricHas a toe separator to hold the foot in place in styleOutsoleDurable outsole with waved grooves at midfoot and texture at toe for ultimate grip even on smooth surfacesReinforced heel cap for heel durabilitySandal careWipe surface with a damp, clean cloth to remove dust and dirtDo not wash or store in direct sunlight
